case_title: LESLIE BLAKELY VS. PACIFIC MARINE YACHT CHARTERS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAKELY, LESLIE AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC MARINE YACHT CHARTERS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SIGNATURE HOSPITALITY GROUP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
